prompt: A studio photograph on a solid deep navy background. Massive white bold italic text 'OWN THE SUN.' in the typeface from the font reference fills 50% of the canvas. A Filipino male holds up ONE pair of Bandits Blue sunglasses from DuberyMNL close to the camera in front of the text -- the sunglasses are large and prominent in the frame, filling about 30% of the image width, real glossy sunglasses matching the reference image.
